function.message: The new owner model is not elegant, but it survived a messy week. I will take ugly and real over clean and fake.
function.rulebook_notes: Performed required bootstrap and read nested AGENTS.MD files before task work; completed exhaustive channel review per task hint.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical entity record 10_entities/cast/omar.md resolves target as Omar Haddad (alias omar). Across all channel transcripts in 60_outbox/channels/*.md, Omar-attributed messages appear in dockflow_ops_slack.md, where the latest dated entry is 2026-04-10 with the returned message text.
